name: The Settlers® : Heritage of Kings - History Edition
short_description: With this modernized History Edition dive into the diversified mix of enthralling build-up matches and exciting real-time fights. Manifold landscapes await to be explored and populated. Includes the main game plus the two expansions.
detailed_description:
With this modernized History Edition, dive into the diversified mix of enthralling build-up matches and exciting real-time fights. Manifold landscapes await to be explored and populated. Includes the main game plus both expansions.

IMPROVEMENT HIGHLIGHTS: Windows 10 compatible, multiplayer via Uplay
about_the_game:

supported_languages:

*languages with full audio support
